gameLobbyMd:
# Game Lobby

This is a sample markdown to demonstrate various markdown features.

## Starting soon

Game is starting soon. **Get ready!**

## Rules

1. Wait for the host to start the game.
2. Follow the instructions on the presenter screen.
3. Open [Games for Crowds](https://gamesforcrowds.com) for more info.

## What people say

> **This game is awesome!** - Player 1

> **I had a good time playing this.** - Player 2

> **Always looking forward to the next round!** - Player 3

---

## Sample Code

```typescript
// Code block
console.log('Hello, world!');
```
createProfileMd:
# Welcome!

Please enter your name to join the game.
menuHelpMd:
# Help

This is the help section. Here you can find information about how to play the game and get assistance if needed.

## How to Play

1. Join the game using the provided link or QR code.
2. Follow the instructions on your screen.
3. Interact with other players as required by the game.

## Getting Assistance

If you encounter any issues, please contact the host or refer to the FAQ section on our website.
sharedStatePlayerMd:
# Shared State Player
You are connected as a player. Host has started the game. In this shared state example the playtime is synchronized between all players.
